title: Dashboard navigation performance — eliminate multi-second hangs between pages

steps.description: Backend: request-timing middleware + pool-status logging; explicit DB pool config with env vars; TTL cache for worktree-badge; TTL cache for _git_branch_and_stats and /worktrees page git calls; asyncio-aware sleep in daemon_control
Code review: S01 (middleware placement, pool kwargs, cache concurrency safety, no leaked DB sessions, asyncio correctness)
Code review: S03 (bounded query counts, correct aggregation semantics, no behavior regression, query counts asserted in tests)

Frontend: prebuilt Tailwind CSS with make target (relax base.html CDN JIT + update dashboard/CLAUDE.md); move Mermaid/hljs/DOMPurify/streaming-markdown into per-page {% block head %}; self-host Inter font
Code review: S05 (no dynamic Tailwind class construction, prebuilt CSS coverage, page-by-page lazy-load correctness, no fonts.googleapis.com leaks, CLAUDE.md consistency)

Tests: pool config unit, TTL cache unit, timing middleware unit, N+1 regression (query-count assertions) for all 5 hotspots, badge endpoint integration (cache hit = zero subprocess), base.html render + prebuilt-CSS presence
Code review: S07 (tests fail on pre-change code, testcontainer compliance, semantic assertions not shape-only, no live-DB connections, fixture reuse)
Final cross-layer review: observability + pool + caching + N+1 + frontend integration; AC1–AC8 coverage; no regressions on adjacent routes; CLAUDE.md compliance
QV: Browser verification — visual parity, sidebar badge still functional, Mermaid/hljs pages still render, no console errors, nav no longer hangs
